title: The Institute of Teaching and Research in Ayurveda Act, 2020
full_text: The Institute of Teaching and Research in Ayurveda Act, 2020 आयुर्वेद शिक्षण और अनुसंधान संस्थान अधिनियम, 2020 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 202016 Act Number: 16 Enactment Date: 2020-09-21 Act Year: 2020 Short Title: The Institute of Teaching and Research in Ayurveda Act, 2020 Hindi Title: आयुर्वेद शिक्षण और अनुसंधान संस्थान अधिनियम, 2020 Long Title: An Act to provide for the establishment of an Institute of Teaching and Research in Ayurveda and to declare it as an Institution of national importance for the promotion of quality and excellence in education, research and training in Ayurveda and allied disciplines and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto Ministry: Ministry of AYUSH Enforcement Date: 15-10-2020 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Institute of Teaching and Research in Ayurveda Act, 2020 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II THE INSTITUTE Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Declaration of institute of Teaching and Research in Ayurveda as an institution of national importance. Section 3. Definitions. Section 4. Establishment and incorporation of Anteceding Institutions as Institute of Teaching and Research in Ayurveda. Section 5. Effect of incorporation of Anteceding Institutions as Institute of Teaching and Research in Ayurveda. Section 6. Composition of Institute. Section 7. Terms of office of, and vacancies among, members. Section 8. President of Institute. Section 9. Meetings of Institute. Section 10. Governing Body and other committees of Institute. Section 11. Staff of Institute. Section 12. Objects of Institute. Section 13. Functions of Institute. Section 14. Payment to Institute. Section 15. Fund of Institute. Section 16. Budget of Institute. Section 17. Accounts and audit. Section 18. Annual report. Section 19. Pension and provident funds. Section 20. Authentication of orders and instruments of Institute. Section 21. Acts and proceedings not to be invalidated by vacancies, etc. Section 22. Grant of degrees, diplomas, etc., by Institute. Section 23. Recognition of medical qualifications granted by Institute. Section 24. Control by Central Govern. Section 25. Resolution of differences. Section 26. Returns and information. Section 27. Power to make rules. Section 28. Power to make regulations. Section 29. Rules and regulations to be laid before Parliament. Section 30. Power to remove difficulties. Section 31. Transitional provisions.
